name: Simple Currency Conversion
short_description: Convert a given amount from one currency to another using a direct exchange rate. The calculation involves deciding whether to multiply or divide by the quoted rate based on the currency pair.

inputs.name: pair
inputs.description: The currency pair (e.g., EUR/USD, GBP/USD, USD/JPY).

inputs.name: amount
inputs.description: The initial amount in the base currency to be converted.

inputs.name: rate
inputs.description: The exchange rate for the specified currency pair.

name: Pip Value Calculation
short_description: Calculates the monetary value of a one-pip movement for a given position size in a Forex pair.

inputs.name: lot
inputs.description: The position size or number of units traded in the currency pair.

inputs.name: pip_size
inputs.description: The size of one pip for the specific currency pair (e.g., 0.0001 for EUR/USD, 0.01 for USD/JPY).

name: Profit/Loss on a Forex Trade
short_description: Calculates the profit or loss on a forex trade by determining the pip difference, pip value, and then multiplying them.

inputs.name: pair
inputs.description: The currency pair traded (e.g., EUR/USD, USD/JPY). Important for determining the base currency of the P/L.

inputs.name: open_
inputs.description: The opening price of the currency pair.

inputs.name: close
inputs.description: The closing price of the currency pair.

inputs.name: lot
inputs.description: The size of the trade in units (e.g., 10,000 or 100,000 units).

inputs.name: pip
inputs.description: The value of one pip for the specific currency pair (e.g., 0.0001 for major USD pairs, 0.01 for JPY pairs).

name: Cross-Currency Conversion
short_description: Convert an amount from one currency to another using two different currency pairs to calculate the implied cross rate.

inputs.name: eur_usd
inputs.description: The exchange rate of EUR to USD

inputs.name: gbp_usd
inputs.description: The exchange rate of GBP to USD

inputs.name: amt_eur
inputs.description: The amount in Euros to be converted

name: Triangular Arbitrage Profit/Loss
short_description: Calculates the net profit or loss from a triangular arbitrage strategy by converting an initial USD amount through EUR and GBP, and back to USD.

inputs.name: usd_eur
inputs.description: The exchange rate for converting USD to EUR (EUR per USD).

inputs.name: eur_gbp
inputs.description: The exchange rate for converting EUR to GBP (GBP per EUR).

inputs.name: gbp_usd
inputs.description: The exchange rate for converting GBP to USD (USD per GBP).

inputs.name: start_usd
inputs.description: The initial amount of USD to begin the arbitrage.
